name: Authentic Pennsylvania Dutch Shoo Fly Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, dissolve baking soda in boiling water and add egg yolk and molasses. Set aside to cool.
2. In a large bowl, mix flour with ground ginger, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and salt until well combined.
3. Add butter to the dry ingredients and cut using a pastry blender or your fingers until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Pour boiling water into the egg yolk mixture from step 1.
5. Pour the molasses mixture into a greased pie shell.
6. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the top of the filling.
7. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes.
8. Reduce the temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and set.
9. Allow the pie to cool before serving.
